title: Door Tweaks
description: 3D windows, side textures and other additions
body:
![A screenshot showing most of the doors and trapdoors in this pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hYTZC3GD/images/7cecf5a4240685e1c143ab64043c35f5dae917d6.png) ### Door Tweaks makes tons of QOL changes to doors and trapdoors Changes range from large like making windows and door knobs 3D, giving them better side textures and changing the item textures and models, to more minor things like fixing the lighting of doors on their textures and models and removing handles from trapdoors for better building textures. Iron doors as well as iron, crimson and warped trapdoors have the largest changes in design while the rest remain very faithful to their vanilla look mainly consisting of palette changes, shading changes and slight design changes. The ALT packs have the vanilla warped and crimson trapdoors if you prefer them --- This is a small pack that takes features from my large, vanilla-like pack, [Stormilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stormilla) in case you only wanted these changes in particular. More standalones to come. --- ### [Stormilla Villa Discord Server](https://discord.gg/e5CKcu2G6c) - For pack announcements, leave feedback, exclusive previews, occasional beta releases, help Credits: --- - [Septyna](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/septyna/): Contributor - [Insanial](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/insanial/): Inspiration for lighting fix on door textures --- © 2021 StormDragon77 | Some Rights Reserved | CC BY-NC-SA
